title: Consumption per Consumer Category, Region and Hour (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Hourly consumption of business sector, public sector and private units by region.

Data is updated with a 9-15 day delay.
The **consumer categories** are created based on DK10 Industry Codes as specified by Statistics Denmark:
* Erhverv (Business Sector): All units related to a CVR number including category 11 ('Uoplyst aktiviteter'), except those that belong to category 9.
* Offentligt (Public Sector): Units in category 9 ('Offentlig administration, undervisning og sundhed').
* Privat (Private): Other units (without CVR numbers).

To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data have been applied**. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set to 60 percent per hour for 3 hours straight. 
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order: 
1. Consumer categories being combined into 2 categories
2. Regions being combined and/or aggregated
3. Time being combined and/or aggregated
